steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the height of Tikal Temple IV. Locate that pyramid in the table and read the value in the Height column.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "70 meters tall.": the value shown in Tikal Temple IV's row. ✓
  • "138.8 meters tall.": height of a different pyramid in the table. ✗
  • "143.5 meters tall.": height of a different pyramid in the table. ✗
  • "100 meters tall.": height of a different pyramid in the table. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
